overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through a heavy snowstorm in a mountainous winter landscape. The character navigates deep snow along a river bank surrounded by snow-covered pine trees and rocky outcrops, with visibility severely limited by falling snow and fog.

events.description: character stumbles briefly while walking through deep snow but quickly recovers balance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow along a river bank, briefly stumbles at 16 seconds but continues forward progress

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow lining the left side of the valley
snow-covered pine trees on the right side of the path
partially frozen river flowing along the right side of the valley
deep snow covering the valley floor with visible footprints trailing behind
large rocks covered in snow becoming visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a heavy snowstorm in a mountain valley, with snow-covered pine trees lining both sides and a partially frozen river visible to the right. At approximately 16 seconds, the character briefly stumbles in the deep snow before recovering and continuing forward through the whiteout conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky snow-covered terrain with large boulders

agents.ego_description: navigating around large snow-covered boulders on the right while maintaining steady forward progress through the deep snow

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a section of the valley dominated by large snow-covered boulders on the right side. The river recedes into the distance while the character navigates closely around the rocky outcrops, with scattered pine trees now visible only in the far background through the persistent snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley with distant mountain slopes

agents.ego_description: continuing through the open snowy valley with the river becoming visible again on the right, heading toward distant tree line

entered.detail: steep snow-covered mountain slope rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a more open section of the snowy valley, with the river reappearing closer on the right side and snow-covered mountain slopes becoming visible in the left background. The large boulders from the previous section fall behind as the character approaches a distant line of pine trees through the heavy snowfall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a blinding mountain snowstorm that shifts from a riverside valley into a rugged, boulder-strewn pass. It begins with the character trekking through deep snow between rows of frost-covered pine trees, with a partially frozen river flowing alongside them. As the character briefly stumbles in the heavy whiteout conditions, the camera continues forward, causing the river to gradually recede into the distance. The scene then shifts as the dense forest gives way to a landscape dominated by massive, snow-capped boulders on the right. Finally, the character navigates closely around these rocky outcrops while the remaining pine trees fade into the far background through the persistent snowfall.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive snowy corridor that gradually opens into a wider mountain valley. It begins as the character leaves behind a cluster of large boulders, moving forward into a more expansive section of the terrain. As the path clears, the river reappears closer on the right side while the heavy snowfall reveals the looming presence of snow-covered mountain slopes in the left background. The scene then shifts toward a distant line of pine trees, with the camera tracking the character's steady progress through the whiteout toward the wooded horizon.
